title: Logo and Brand Identity Design for FULLRYD
brief: I need a finalized logo and mini brand identity for a new scholarship-focused merchandise brand called FULLRYD. The brand helps support education through merch sales and scholarship-style campaigns. The style should feel bold, modern, youthful, collegiate, and merch-ready — more premium streetwear than charity/nonprofit. The name must appear as FULLRYD in all caps. I would like a graduation-cap element included, but it should be clean and scalable, not overly detailed. The logo must work on social profile pictures, hoodies, hats, website headers, stickers, and watermarks. Please avoid anything that looks like a government seal, university seal, lottery logo, or generic education clipart. Deliverables needed: primary logo, stacked logo, icon/avatar version, black version, white version, transparent PNGs, SVG, AI or EPS vector source file, PDF, color palette, font recommendations, and basic usage guide. I also need written confirmation that the final design is original and that I receive commercial usage rights.
